title: Political rally in Ghosi draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Ghosi promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Ghosi
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Ghosi constituency.
